SYMBOL_LITERAL_TOOLTIP: A C++ symbol, constant, or identifier (e.g. HIGH, LOW, LED_BUILTIN, NULL).
CODE_STATEMENT_TOOLTIP: Raw C++ code. Click to open the code editor.
CODE_EXPRESSION_TOOLTIP: Raw C++ expression. Inserted as-is as a value.
CODE_DECLARATION_TOOLTIP: Blocks inside go to file scope (before setup/loop). Use for includes, defines, global variables.
DO_WHILE_TOOLTIP: Execute the body first, then repeat while the condition is true.
RETURN_TOOLTIP: Return a value from a function. Leave empty for void return.
ARRAY_GET_TOOLTIP: Get an element from an array by index.
ARRAY_SET_TOOLTIP: Set an element in an array by index.
SWITCH_TOOLTIP: Switch on an expression. Use [+] to add cases and [−] to remove them.
CPP_PROC_DEF_RETURN_TOOLTIP: Define a function with a typed return value.
CPP_PROC_DEF_NORETURN_TOOLTIP: Define a function that returns nothing (void).
CPP_PROC_CALL_RETURN_TOOLTIP: Call a function that returns a value.
TYPED_VAR_MODAL_INVALID_NAME: Name is not valid. Please choose a different name.
